deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded April 27, 2026. Lien resolved via Fernando Castillo signature April 21.
deals.next: Post-close follow-up: gift delivery to Joyce, thank Sam VanDenheuvel, thank you baskets for Michael and UPS Store staff

logs.m: Officially closed and funded
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Release delivered to Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo regarding lien holder Fernando Castillo

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: Land sale, 20 acres hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. First offer dead - Michael Rodriguez did not provide earnest money. Steve cleared property. Lead with net after close on next offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve as clearing wraps up. When next offer comes, lead with net after close, not gross price.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. TXR 1404 uploaded to Skyslope. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked in. Commission box correction still needed.
Steve sent new photos. Green screen content opportunity flagged.
Clearing complete. Photos being posted to social. Drone footage prioritized. First offer dead.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned foreclosure. Cleanup in progress. Floor demo complete, drywall cut, new drywall ready. Utility setup with Medina Electric and EMCSUD. Listing agreement needed for Priority Bank.
deals.next: Get transformer number tomorrow. Submit Medina Electric application. Water callback from EMCSUD. Finalize listing agreement for Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Cleanup active. Utility providers confirmed. Email sent to Kelly with utility info. Listing paperwork to Priority Bank.
On-site visit. Met Bryce at property. Work moving forward. Bryce is active military VA buyer opportunity.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater and double-carrying. Payoff ~$493,000. Market value $350,000-$400,000. Sellers carrying Pearl Brewery apartment rent plus $2,843.85 mortgage. Need to choose path: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close.
deals.next: Broker call first. Then call Matt and Chandler with three path options. Where Things Stand email sent May 14.

logs.m: Where Things Stand email sent. Full market analysis with three options. Option 3 highlighted at $518,999.
Stopped by property. Lawn care referral in progress.
Market analysis completed. Underwater by $93,000-$143,000. Strategy conversation needed.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Referral from Isaac Linares. Motivated seller relocating to NC by second week of June. Listed May 14. $259,900 list price. First showing feedback received - cultural concern about direction, roof claim in progress.
deals.next: Monitor for second showing or offer. Roof/fascia decision pending with insurance adjuster. Contact selling agent MK with updates.

logs.m: MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Neighborhood canvassed. First showing feedback: cultural concern about direction, roof claim moving forward.
Insurance adjuster out. Claim moving forward. New roof incoming.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Sisters want to end listing. Isaac interested in mobile home development for displaced veterans. Title defect identified - incomplete legal description. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
deals.next: Follow up with sisters on listing extension. Discuss Isaac development offer formally. Connect Isaac with Josh LT for partnership. Pull listing agreement to check signatories.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed. Isaac development angle expanded to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Jennifer Ball contacted ENV Title and attorney. Title defect confirmed - incomplete legal description. Correction deed being prepared.
Sisters enthusiastic about Isaac development concept. ~$150,000 offer contingent on mobile home project.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Rental listing. Owner James Jimbo Stringer. 1,535 sqft, 3 bed/2 bath. Grace Gardens Lennar. Rent $1,595/month. CMA completed. Listing agreement with all terms confirmed. Vinyl signs needed.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope and send for signatures. Create Home for Rent vinyl signs.

logs.m: Listing agreement fully reviewed. 12 open items sent to Jimbo. All answered same day. Ready for Skyslope finalization.
CMA pulled. Recommended list price $1,595/month. Intro email sent with market analysis.
Talked to Jimbo on road to Devine. Son made flyers. Ready to move forward.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce situation. 3 bed/2 bath, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff $255,578 as of Feb 2026 (~$257,000 today). Thin market - 3 comps in 10 miles. Recommended list price $295,000.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Schedule professional photos. Discuss contractor opportunity at 181 CR 7751. Sign listing agreement.

logs.m: Met at property 10am. CMA pulled. Payoff confirmed $255,578. Listing presentation delivered with interactive net sheet.
Listed as priority for meeting prep.

leads.title: Kurt
leads.detail: Neighbor around 9815 Conbes. Wants intel on nearby listing under contract at $275,000. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Pull CMA for 9815 Conbes. Determine if Kurt is seller, buyer, or investor.

logs.m: Priority today: pull CMA and get everything together. May be ready to list.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing through plants story. Potential content collaboration and real estate opportunity long-term.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story on social. Keep nurturing relationship.

leads.title: Isaac
leads.detail: Met in person. Development opportunity at Borregas with mobile homes for veterans. Interested in multiple projects. Adam is his partner.
leads.next: Full intake call on buy box, budget, timeline. Connect with Josh LT for Borregas partnership.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: 13810 Tangle Tree St. Plans to sell soon. Property 90% complete - having trouble finishing. Working with current realtor. Open to selling as-is.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote to buyer network. Stay connected through garden community.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Son inherited property behind Miss Pat. Previous owner was avid gardener. May not know what to do with inherited home. Sensitive situation - recent loss.
leads.next: Get info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out introducing as neighbor and gardener first. Assess situation.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met at 181 CR 7751 cleanup. Wife is active military. Recently moved from Ohio. Currently renting. Looking to buy in San Antonio area. VA loan eligible.
leads.next: Get contact info when on site at 181 CR. Qualify wife for VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent in Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property that needs work. Unique situation details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and property. Identify matching inventory.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Need to move fast. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA requirement. Connected with Zach Schaphorst and Erik Williams for lending. Pre-approval status unknown.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Set up new construction search platform. Identify builders with no HOA options.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing contact. Chris helped him get into real estate. Opportunity 1: Green Bliss rental listing and PM setup. Opportunity 2: Milagros Stringer (his mom) new construction buyer in Grace Gardens area.
leads.next: Finalize Green Bliss rental listing agreement. Send Milagros buyer rep agreement. Schedule Grace Gardens visit with both.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Moran is contact. New construction buyer. Budget $50,000 down, target ~$1,000/month payment. Not locked to Grace Gardens. Builder rate buydowns key angle. Multiple builder options being pulled.
leads.next: Confirm buyer rep signature. Pull inventory keeping payments under $1,200/mo. Connect with builders for options.

priorities.title: 340 Sollock Seller Decision
priorities.notes: Critical - underwater $93K-$143K. Sellers need to choose between short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close. Email sent May 14. Awaiting call to present options.

followUps.text: Call broker about short sale protocol and Devine listing strategy
Call Matt and Chandler with three path options
Confirm sellers appetite for chosen path

priorities.title: 8527 Green Bliss Rental Listing
priorities.notes: Jimbo answered all 12 questions May 14. Ready to finalize agreement in Skyslope and send for signatures. Vinyl signs ordered.

followUps.text: Order and install vinyl Home for Rent signs

priorities.title: Colton Brown Listing Launch
priorities.sub: Get payoff letter and schedule photos
priorities.notes: Met May 15. CMA done ($295,000 recommended). Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb. Need updated payoff from lender. Then professional photos and listing agreement.

followUps.text: Request updated payoff letter from lender

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 Utilities & Listing
priorities.sub: Submit transformer application and finalize list price
priorities.notes: Cleanup progressing well. Electric and water providers confirmed. Need transformer number on site. Utilities application ready. Listing agreement needed for Priority Bank.

followUps.text: Get transformer number on-site and submit Medina Electric application
Confirm water setup with EMCSUD callback
Send listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham

priorities.title: Milagros Stringer New Construction
priorities.notes: Buyer rep sent but not yet signed. Multiple builder options being sourced. Rate buydowns key. Zach Schaphorst pre-approval status unknown.

followUps.text: Pull builder inventory and schedule Grace Gardens visit with Brandon
